headline: Cboe Global Markets Announces Date of Second-Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
summary: Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), a leading global markets operator and pioneer in equity and index derivatives, will announce its financial results for the second quarter of 2026 before the market opens on Friday, July 31, 2026. A conference call with remarks by the company's senior management will begin at 7:30 a.m. CT (8:30 a.m. ET).

headline: Cboe Global Markets Reports Trading Volume for June 2026
summary: Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), a leading global markets operator and pioneer in equity and index derivatives, today reported June trading volume statistics across its global business lines and provided guidance for selected revenue per contract/net revenue capture metrics for the second quarter of 2026.

headline: Micron-Ford chip deal, TeraWulf stock gets lift, private equity takes over easyJet
summary: Market Domination Host Josh Lipton tracks several of the day's top trending stock tickers, including Micron Technology (MU) announcing a new chip partnership with Ford (F), TeraWulf's (WULF) new AI infrastructure deal with Anthropic (ANTH.PVT), and easyJet (EZJ.L) stock soaring on a new takeover deal from private equity firm Castle Lake.

headline: Here's Why Cboe Global's Revenue Growth Is More Than a Trading Story
summary: Cboe Global's revenue growth extends beyond trading, powered by options strength, recurring data services, global expansion and a diversified revenue mix.

headline: DENARIUS METALS ANNOUNCES INITIAL RESULTS FROM ITS 2026 DRILLING CAMPAIGN AT ITS ZANCUDO PROJECT IN COLOMBIA, PROVIDING FURTHER CONFIRMATION OF HIGH-GRADE GOLD AND SILVER MINERALIZATION IN MULTIPLE STRUCTURES AT THE LAS BRISAS TARGET
summary: Denarius Metals Corp. (Cboe CA: DMET) (OTCQX: DNRSF) ("Denarius Metals" or the "Company") provided an update today on the initial drill results from its 2026 surface in-fill diamond drilling program on the Las Brisas Target at its Zancudo Project in Colombia. The results announced today have been received from the final assays for the first four drill holes totaling approximately 660 meters carried out from the first purpose-built surface drill platform.
